mapper.update: UPDATE book SET stock_count = stock_count - 1, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{bookId} AND version = #{version} AND stock_count > borrow_count
UPDATE book SET borrow_count = borrow_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{bookId}
UPDATE book SET stock_count = stock_count + 1, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{bookId}
